message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate bracket patterns in collections_mod, str_conv, type_checks

- collections_mod.zig: Add emitCounterMostCommon, emitCounterElements helpers
- str_conv.zig: Add emitMethodCallWrapped, emitMethodCallCatch, emitTryMethodCall,
  emitRuntimeCall helpers for __str__/__repr__ method calls
- type_checks.zig: Add emitRuntimeFunc, emitRuntimeFunc2 helpers for
  pyTypeName, isCallable, isSubclass, id, delattr patterns

Reduces emit(")") count from 217 to 207 (~5% reduction)
